'''âp-t-sh''' ('''patasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:punce|punce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:punce|punce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-sh
|-
! Lemma
| patasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:patashithi|patashithi]] || [[word:patashiji|patashiji]] || [[word:patashishi|patashishi]] || [[word:patashi|patashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:patashuthuth|patashuthuth]] || [[word:patashujuj|patashujuj]] || [[word:patashushush|patashushush]] || [[word:patash|patash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:patashuthu|patashuthu]] || [[word:patashuju|patashuju]] || [[word:patashushu|patashushu]] || [[word:patashu|patashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:patashufuth|patashufuth]] || [[word:patashufuj|patashufuj]] || [[word:patashufush|patashufush]] || [[word:patashuf|patashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:patashethe|patashethe]] || [[word:patasheje|patasheje]] || [[word:patasheshe|patasheshe]] || [[word:patashe|patashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:patashothoth|patashothoth]] || [[word:patashojoj|patashojoj]] || [[word:patashoshosh|patashoshosh]] || [[word:patash|patash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:patashotho|patashotho]] || [[word:patashojo|patashojo]] || [[word:patashosho|patashosho]] || [[word:patasho|patasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:patashofoth|patashofoth]] || [[word:patashofoj|patashofoj]] || [[word:patashofosh|patashofosh]] || [[word:patashof|patashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:patashĂŠthĂŠ|patashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:patashĂŠjĂŠ|patashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:patashĂŠshĂŠ|patashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:patashĂŠ|patashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:patashathath|patashathath]] || [[word:patashajaj|patashajaj]] || [[word:patashashash|patashashash]] || [[word:patash|patash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:patashatha|patashatha]] || [[word:patashaja|patashaja]] || [[word:patashasha|patashasha]] || [[word:patasha|patasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:patashafath|patashafath]] || [[word:patashafaj|patashafaj]] || [[word:patashafash|patashafash]] || [[word:patashaf|patashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:patashasha|patashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopatashasha|gopatashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipatashasha|gokipatashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:patashnĂŒsha|patashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopatashnknĂŒsha|gopatashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipatashnĂŒsha|gokipatashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:patashĂ«sha|patashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopatashnkshĂ«sha|gopatashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipatashĂ«sha|gokipatashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:patashrosha|patashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatashnkrosha|gopatashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatashrosha|gokipatashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:patashmusha|patashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatashnkmusha|gopatashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatashmusha|gokipatashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:patasherasha|patasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopatashnksherasha|gopatashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipatasherasha|gokipatasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:patashngasha|patashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopatashnkngasha|gopatashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipatashngasha|gokipatashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:patashyasha|patashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopatashnkyasha|gopatashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipatashyasha|gokipatashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:patashyamasha|patashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopatashnkyamasha|gopatashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipatashyamasha|gokipatashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:patashnĂŒshĂ«sha|patashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopatashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopatashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipatashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipatashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:patashnĂŒrosha|patashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatashnknĂŒrosha|gopatashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatashnĂŒrosha|gokipatashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patashnĂŒmusha|patashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatashnknĂŒmusha|gopatashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatashnĂŒmusha|gokipatashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:patashĂ«nĂŒsha|patashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopatashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopatashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipatashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipatashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:patashĂ«rosha|patashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatashnkshĂ«rosha|gopatashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatashĂ«rosha|gokipatashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patashĂ«musha|patashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatashnkshĂ«musha|gopatashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatashĂ«musha|gokipatashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:patashronĂŒsha|patashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopatashnkronĂŒsha|gopatashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipatashronĂŒsha|gokipatashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:patashroshĂ«sha|patashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopatashnkroshĂ«sha|gopatashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipatashroshĂ«sha|gokipatashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patashromusha|patashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatashnkromusha|gopatashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatashromusha|gokipatashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:patashmunĂŒsha|patashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopatashnkmunĂŒsha|gopatashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipatashmunĂŒsha|gokipatashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:patashmushĂ«sha|patashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopatashnkmushĂ«sha|gopatashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipatashmushĂ«sha|gokipatashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:patashmurosha|patashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatashnkmurosha|gopatashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatashmurosha|gokipatashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:patash|patash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠsh|pĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopatash|hopatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠtĂŠsh|hopĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopatash|hohopatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠtĂŠsh|hohopĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpatash|nĂŒpatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŒpĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpatash|nĂŒnĂŒpatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpatash|nĂŻpatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŻpĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpatash|nĂŻnĂŻpatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠtĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupatash|lupatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠtĂŠsh|lupĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupatash|lulupatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠtĂŠsh|lulupĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipatash|lipatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠtĂŠsh|lipĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipatash|lilipatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠtĂŠsh|lilipĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopatash|kopatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠtĂŠsh|kopĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopatash|kokopatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠtĂŠsh|kokopĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepatash|kepatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠtĂŠsh|kepĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepatash|kekepatash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠtĂŠsh|kekepĂŠtĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
